{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration 075: Verge
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Iteration]] 075 is named [[Verge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
